name: Minted Butter Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pint (approximately 1 cup) of strong vegetable stock
2 tablespoons fresh mint or 1 teaspoon dried mint
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the onions and garlic in a little of the vegetable stock until they start to soften.
2. Add the chopped tomatoes and cooked butter beans to the skillet.
3. Stir in the fresh or dried mint.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Pour in the remaining vegetable stock and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
6. Cover and cook for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the flavors are well blended.
7. Serve as a main dish with wholemeal bread rolls and a green salad.
Note: This recipe may not be authentic Greek butter bean preparation due to the omission of olive oil.
